message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.quantile (1 case)

Append 1 live-pandas oracle test covering DataFrame.quantile():

- quantile_median: 5-row 2-col float frame, q=0.5 returns column-
  wise medians (3.0 for x, 30.0 for y)

The test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.quantile(q=0.5)), runs the Rust DataFrame.quantile(0.5),
and asserts parity via compare_series_expected. DataFrameQuantile was
already wired through the Series response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-l75jb]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
